raw_results.query: What should I do,in order to protect from running seeding commands against production database?
raw_results.answer:
To protect from running seeding commands against your production database, you will be prompted for confirmation before the seeders are executed. [SOURCE: seeder.txt | CHUNKID: 2] 

However, if you want to force the seeders to run without a prompt, you can use the --force flag: 
php artisan db:seed --force [SOURCE: seeder.txt | CHUNKID: 2]
